meta.title: Sichinohe Town Ski Area — LP Mock (Template Preview)
meta.description: Landing page concept for Sichinohe Town Ski Area based on the visitor growth strategy report. Static preview with mock imagery.

banner.text: Template implementation preview | AI-generated mock images | Not the production site

transit.title:
Shinkansen to
the snow.
transit.lead: About three hours from Tokyo. Exit Sichinohe-Towada Station and a roughly 10-minute taxi ride—transit-resort travel with minimal friction.
transit.imgAlt: Travel image of snowy scenery seen from a Tohoku Shinkansen car

primary.title: About 10 minutes from the Shinkansen
primary.lead: Roughly 10 minutes by taxi from Tohoku Shinkansen Sichinohe-Towada Station. A municipal ski area that's easy to stop at mid-journey. At ¥2,500 for a day ticket, even a short visit pays for itself.
primary.imgAlt: Travel image of snowy scenery seen from a Shinkansen car

secondary.title: To a gensen onsen paradise
secondary.lead: After skiing, soak at Higashi-Hakkoda Onsen where 48°C spring water flows straight into the bath. From around ¥300 for adults—enjoy silky water at a local sento alongside residents.

onsen.title:
An area where
gensen flows daily
onsen.lead: Around Sichinohe, onsen lovers call it a "gensen paradise." Moor springs and simple alkaline springs—some facilities pour amber water generously from tub to shower.
onsen.whisper: From around ¥300 entry, hopping between two or three local baths after skiing is a classic post-run ritual.
onsen.imgAlt: Image of an outdoor bath surrounded by forest

powder.title: Powder from the station
powder.body: Champion Course up to 35° on ungroomed snow. Fresh deep snow without powder panic. Also serves as a backup slope when Hakkoda is closed.

shinkansen.title: Go by Shinkansen
shinkansen.body: Tokyo ~3 hours → station → 10-minute taxi. A strategic stop on a Honshu–Hokkaido route with JR EAST PASS. Design a day of extremes: Tokyo morning, slopes afternoon, onsen evening.

beginners.title: Beginners & families
beginners.body: A wide groomed run with a maximum pitch of 10°. Free night-lesson Thursdays from 19:00 and simple lodge food—an authentic local guide for newcomers.

access.note: About 10 minutes by taxi from Tohoku Shinkansen Sichinohe-Towada Station (approx.)
